CustomField.formula: IF(( DATE( YEAR( TODAY() ) , MONTH( TODAY() ), IF(DAY(TODAY())> 25, 25,DAY(TODAY())) ) - Task_Start_Date__c ) / ((Actual_End_date__c - Task_Start_Date__c )+1)<0,0,DATE( YEAR( TODAY() ) , MONTH( TODAY() ), IF(DAY(TODAY())>25,25,DAY(TODAY()))) - Task_Start_Date__c ) / ((Actual_End_date__c - Task_Start_Date__c )+1)
CustomField.label: Hidden Resident Engineer Hrs 25
